name: The Pit Arcade
short_description: 2D platformer. Overcome traps, fight your way through rows of enemies, collect coins and lives, win the battle and free humanity in 4 main chapters and 8 extra chapters with atmospheric soundrack.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of The Pit Arcade, where a long journey through various obstacles and different environments awaits you. Journey into a dark dimension to stop the monster invasion. 4 story chapters await you (The cave, Landscape, Dark temple and Evil dimension) + 8 extra chapters with different modes and topics.

In the game you have the option to shoot projectiles that you launch from your magic hand to eliminate monsters. Don't forget to keep an eye on the lives you collect along with coins along the way. And finally, watch out for every jump or dodge.

There are also 8 extra chapters in the game - EnemyShooter, Bounce City, Time Race, Longmania, Easy levels, Reverse Realm, Jump king and Gravity-man. Each episode has something to offer in terms of mode and level design... And, of course, music! Each episode has its own soundtrack that adds to the atmosphere.

  • Enemyshooter - Elliminate all enemies to finish levels

  • Bounce city - Bouncing mushrooms everywhere! Even the red dangerous ones!

  • Time Race - Collect all coins in time

  • Longmania - Special long levels

  • Easy levels - that are easy...

  • Reverse realm - Beat the levels... upside down!

  • Jump King - Get to the top

  • Gravity-man - Use gravity changers to win

There are many traps in the game, such as spikes, toxic water, shooting walls, black matter, etc. The enemies have several variations. from small fast opponents to big bosses.

Enjoy a journey of The Pit Warrior, use ladders, teleporters or even gravity changers and save the world!

Here we go!
